title: Use Stream instead of Enum for a large-list pipeline
prompt:
Given:

```
def first_ten_even_squares(big_list) do
  big_list
  |> Enum.map(&(&1 * &1))
  |> Enum.filter(&(rem(&1, 2) == 0))
  |> Enum.take(10)
end
```

The `Enum` chain realizes the full mapped-and-filtered list just to take 10 elements. Rewrite using `Stream.map/2` and `Stream.filter/2`, ending with `Enum.take/2` which forces the pipeline lazily. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.LazyPipeline do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Requires recognizing that laziness matters when a downstream `take/2` can short-circuit.
